race.description: Brown Family Wine Group Mdn Plate
race.comment: REIGN OF DAME (11) finished fourth over 870m here when resuming last start, beaten only 0.8 lengths. Strips fitter and can find winning ways. AEROPOWER (9) hasn't been far away lately, last time finishing sixth over 870m at this circuit, and gets some weight relief today. Definite winning hope on best figures. THROW IT BACK (5) debuted two weeks ago when he finished fifth over 1200m at this course, beaten 3.5 lengths. Will have taken some benefit from that race day experience and is worth following up. COLINTON (2) looks to have the ability.
